# @tuition/admin — Admin Portal

**Not yet scaffolded.** This tree is generated by the Vite CLI (it owns its own
`package.json`, `vite.config.ts`, etc.), so it's a separate step — do not hand-create it.

Generate it (from repo root) when starting M1:

```bash
cd apps && pnpm create vite@latest admin -- --template react-ts
cd admin
pnpm add @tanstack/react-query @tanstack/react-router @tanstack/react-table
pnpm add zustand react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers zod @tuition/shared
pnpm add -D tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add button input table dialog form card badge sonner tabs select
```

Stack: React 19, Vite 6, TanStack Router/Query/Table, shadcn/ui + Tailwind 4,
Zustand, React Hook Form + Zod. See SRS §11.6 for the full target structure.
